defs: The quality of being agreeable or pleasing; that quality which gives satisfaction or moderate pleasure to the mind or senses.
quotes: That author . . . has an agreeableness that charms us.

defs: The quality of being agreeable or suitable; suitableness or conformity; consistency.
quotes: The agreeableness of virtuous actions to human nature.

defs: Resemblance; concordance; harmony; -- with to or between.
quotes: The agreeableness between man and the other parts of the universe.
